staid_archetype_eligible_country = {
	is_country_type = default
	is_nomadic = no
}

staid_archetype_hard_extermination = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = fanatic_purifiers
		has_ai_personality = devouring_swarm
		has_ai_personality = metalhead
		has_ai_personality = exterminators
		has_ai_personality = became_the_crisis
		has_ai_personality = scorching_infernals
		has_ai_personality = hyperthermia_empire
		has_valid_civic = civic_fanatic_purifiers
		has_valid_civic = civic_hive_devouring_swarm
		has_valid_civic = civic_machine_terminator
		has_valid_civic = civic_scorched_earth
		has_valid_civic = civic_hive_scorched_earth
		has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = hive_mind
		has_ai_personality = machine_intelligence
		has_ai_personality = assimilators
		has_ai_personality = servitors
		has_ai_personality = hive_mind_friend
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_defensive = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = decadent_hierarchy
		has_ai_personality = harmonious_hierarchy
		has_ai_personality = xenophobic_isolationists
		has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_pacifist
		has_valid_civic = civic_inwards_perfection
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_research = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = erudite_explorers
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = spiritual_seekers
		has_ai_personality = federation_builders
		has_ai_personality = peaceful_traders
		has_ai_personality = migrating_flock
	}
}

staid_archetype_hard_conquest = {
	OR = {
		has_ai_personality = honorbound_warriors
		has_ai_personality = evangelising_zealots
		has_ai_personality = ruthless_capitalists
		has_ai_personality = hegemonic_imperialists
		has_ai_personality = slaving_despots
		has_ai_personality = democratic_crusaders
		has_ai_personality = fanatic_befrienders
	}
}

staid_archetype_identity_conflict = {
	OR = {
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		}
		AND = {

			staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes

		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes

		}
		AND = {

		AND = {

		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		}
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_extermination = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
		AND = {
			NOR = {
				staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
			}
			OR = {
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = purger
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = attack_neutrals
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_gestalt_growth = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_gestalt_growth = yes
		AND = {
			NOR = {
				staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
			}
			OR = {
				is_hive_empire = yes
				is_machine_empire = yes
				is_wilderness_empire = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_defensive = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_defensive = yes
		AND = {
			NOR = {
				staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
			}
			has_federator_personality = no
			OR = {
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = isolationist
				is_pacifist = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_research = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_research = yes
		AND = {
			NOR = {
				staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
				staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
			}
			has_federator_personality = no
			NOR = {
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = conqueror
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = subjugator
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = dominator
			}
			OR = {
				has_valid_civic = civic_technocracy
				has_ethic = ethic_materialist
				has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_materialist
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_diplomatic = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_diplomatic = yes
		AND = {
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = no
			NOR = {
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = conqueror
			}
			OR = {
				has_federator_personality = yes
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = liberator
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = multispecies
				has_ai_personality_behaviour = uplifter
				has_ethic = ethic_xenophile
				has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_xenophile
				has_ethic = ethic_egalitarian
				has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_egalitarian
			}
		}
	}
}

staid_archetype_candidate_conquest = {
	OR = {
		staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = conqueror
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = subjugator
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = dominator
		has_ai_personality_behaviour = propagator
		has_ethic = ethic_militarist
		has_ethic = ethic_fanatic_militarist
		has_valid_civic = civic_distinguished_admiralty
		has_valid_civic = civic_nationalistic_zeal
		has_valid_civic = civic_barbaric_despoilers
		has_valid_civic = civic_machine_assimilator
	}
}

	staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
	staid_archetype_candidate_extermination = yes

	staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no

	staid_archetype_candidate_gestalt_growth = yes
